title: Pelmeni
description: This resource pack replaces the standard mushroom stew item with the legendary Russian meat dumplings (Pelmeni) with high-quality 128x textures.
body: --- # 🥟 Russian Snacks: Pelmeni Bowl Add a touch of Russian culture to your Minecraft experience! This high-quality resource pack replaces the standard vanilla Mushroom Stew with a legendary bowl of pelmeni. This specific version features the most iconic and beloved comfort food: Pelmeni (Meat Dumplings). ### 🌍 Cultural Context In Eastern Europe, this hot dish is a cult-classic comfort food. The Pelmeni version combines the simple tradition of meat dumplings with the taste of a world-famous local delicacy. It's a perfect piece of authentic "Slavic core" for your game! --- ### ✨ Key Features * **Authentic Look:** Highly detailed 128x texture inspired by a classic steaming bowl of dumplings. * **Pelmeni Edition:** Replaces the generic mushroom stew item with a high-status cultural meal. * **Vanilla Friendly:** Fits perfectly into custom survival servers and themed modpacks. --- ### ⚙️ Technical Notes & Compatibility Due to the custom models and texture resolution, some users may experience stability issues or rare glitches on specific Minecraft versions or when using heavy optimization mods. * If you encounter any visual bugs, try reloading your textures in-game by pressing **F3 + T**. * If you face **any problems, questions, or game crashes**, please report them on my **GitHub Issues** page, and I will help you fix them. --- ### ☕ Support the Creator If you like my work and want to support future content, you can donate here: 👉 https://www.donationalerts.com/r/ky4ka_boroxla 👉 https://boosty.to/createplay
